pi_items.metadata_value: Unable to establish VPN tunnel from Building A conference rooms
pi_items.verified_value: Unable to establish VPN tunnel from Building A conference rooms
pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh, which dynamically injects a request with this exact subject into the ServiceDesk instance using the API.
Confirmed via environment configuration scripts (install_servicedesk.sh and setup_servicedesk.sh) which set the default credentials to administrator / administrator.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated requests created dynamically by setup_task.sh using the ManageEngine ServiceDesk API. The two expected target requests are correctly configured with the subjects 'VPN connection drops intermittently for Building A users' and 'Unable to establish VPN tunnel from Building A conference rooms'. The expected credentials for the administrator account are accurately verified as 'administrator' for both username and password.
